name: useFocusTrap
description: Hook that traps focus within a given element
examples: const { active, disable, toggle, enable } = useFocusTrap(ref, true);
const { ref, active, disable, toggle, enable } = useFocusTrap(true);

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target element for focus trap
